---
title: Marché de noël de Strasbourg
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549194/marchenoelstrasbourgvuehaut_jrwwf3.jpg
description: Marché de noël de Strasbourg
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2023/04/08
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549194/marchenoelstrasbourgvuehaut_jrwwf3.jpg)

:::
